title: campanula scheuchzeri subsp. marcenoi
intro: Campanula scheuchzeri subsp. marcenoi, also known as Alpine Campanula, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the bellflower family. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties due to the presence of sesquiterpene lactones and other compounds. The health benefits of Alpine Campanula are attributed to its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory health, and support the immune system. Alpine Campanula can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to fully understand its potential uses and effects.
